steps.title: Fit the research action
steps.content: The remains can help paleoanthropologists understand steps in hominid evolution and also illuminate the Miocene epoch. The blank needs a verb meaning recognize or identify.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: B would suggest the remains produce the steps themselves. C means make use of for gain, and D means rank by importance; neither fits steps in evolution. Discern means identify or perceive, which fits the research context. The answer is A.
